title: BEM-608 Claude provider gate
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
triggers=Path('governance/triggers'); triggers.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

protocol=protocols/'CLAUDE_PRIMARY_PROVIDER_GATE.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-608 | Claude Primary Provider Gate'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:15 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Назначение'+sep+sep+'Перед исполнением задач внутреннего контура нужно зафиксировать, доступен ли основной Claude provider, или нужно уходить в GPT reserve.'+sep+sep+'## Что проверяется без раскрытия секретов'+sep+'- наличие `CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN`'+sep+'- наличие `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`'+sep+'- наличие workflow окружения GitHub Actions'+sep+sep+'## Ограничение'+sep+'Проверка наличия секрета не доказывает фактический runtime Claude Code и лимиты. Если нужен строгий PASS, должен быть отдельный Claude smoke/action, создающий ответ в repo.'+sep)

workflow=wfs/'claude-primary-provider-gate.yml'
workflow.write_text('''name: Claude Primary Provider Gate

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/triggers/claude_primary_provider_gate.trigger'
      - '.github/workflows/claude-primary-provider-gate.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: claude-primary-provider-gate
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  check-claude-provider:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Write provider gate result
        env:
          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p governance/provider_gates governance/reports governance/state
          HAS_CLAUDE_CODE="false"
          HAS_ANTHROPIC="false"
          if [ -n "$CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN" ]; then HAS_CLAUDE_CODE="true"; fi
          if [ -n "$ANTHROPIC_API_KEY" ]; then HAS_ANTHROPIC="true"; fi
          SELECTED="gpt_reserve"
          RESERVE_USED="true"
          REASON="Claude primary runtime not proven by this gate; using reserve unless Claude audit response appears."
          STATUS="primary_not_proven"
          if [ "$HAS_CLAUDE_CODE" = "true" ]; then
            SELECTED="claude_code_candidate"
            RESERVE_USED="false"
            REASON="CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN is present. Primary provider is candidate, but runtime/limits still require Claude smoke response."
            STATUS="primary_candidate_secret_present"
          fi
          cat > governance/provider_gates/bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate_result.json <<EOF
{
  "schema_version": "provider_gate_result.v1",
  "bem": "BEM-605",
  "gate_id": "bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate",
  "provider_checked": true,
  "primary_provider": "claude_code",
  "reserve_provider": "gpt_python_executor",
  "selected_provider": "${SELECTED}",
  "reserve_used": ${RESERVE_USED},
  "has_claude_code_oauth_token": ${HAS_CLAUDE_CODE},
  "has_anthropic_api_key": ${HAS_ANTHROPIC},
  "reason": "${REASON}",
  "proof_file": "governance/provider_gates/bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate_result.json",
  "checked_at": "workflow_runtime",
  "status": "${STATUS}",
  "blocker": null
}
EOF
          cat > governance/reports/bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate_result.md <<EOF
# BEM-608 | Claude Primary Provider Gate Result

Status: ${STATUS}
Selected provider: ${SELECTED}
Reserve used: ${RESERVE_USED}
Claude Code token present: ${HAS_CLAUDE_CODE}
Anthropic key present: ${HAS_ANTHROPIC}

Secrets were not printed.
EOF

      - name: Commit provider gate result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git add governance/provider_gates/bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate_result.json governance/reports/bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate_result.md
          git commit -m "BEM-608 Claude primary provider gate result" || echo "No changes"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
''')

trigger=triggers/'claude_primary_provider_gate.trigger'
trigger.write_text('BEM-608 trigger claude primary provider gate at 2026-05-18 | 06:15 (UTC+3)'+sep)

report=reports/'bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate_workflow.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-608 | Claude Primary Provider Gate Workflow | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:15 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Created GitHub Actions provider gate workflow. It checks Claude-related secret presence without printing secrets and writes provider gate result. Trigger marker committed.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate_workflow','cycle_id':'bem608-claude-primary-provider-gate-workflow','source':'gpt','status':'completed','workflow':str(workflow),'trigger':str(trigger),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:15 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate_workflow']={'status':'completed','workflow':str(workflow),'trigger':str(trigger),'blocker':None}
state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 06:15 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate_workflow.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-608 PASS: Claude primary provider gate workflow created and triggered.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),str(workflow),str(trigger),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created and triggered Claude primary provider gate workflow to check primary/reserve routing evidence without exposing secrets')
"""
No issue comments.
